title: saussurea runcinata var. pinnatidentata
intro: Saussurea runcinata var. pinnatidentata is a plant species in the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and parts of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Saussurea runcinata var. pinnatidentata is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
